author: Randi Max
text: Amazing service, always above and beyond. Nordstom actually forgot the suite number for Shipping with a Purpose and my daughter's dress was lost right before a huge party. Shipping with a purpose went door to door in the shopping complex to locate the lost dress!!!! How phenomenal is that?! Completely saved the day and with a big smile.

author: Michael Faulkner
text: Incredible! Couldn't be happier with our experience with Shipping with Purpose. I own a custom cabinet shop and they assisted me by shipping an entire house pack of cabinets across the country. We have never done a shipment like this and ... More

author: Max Danley
text: Shipping with purpose is the absolute best - They take care of my business needs everyday and I couldn't survive without them! When my packages arrive I get a call right away and I have never had a hiccup. Highly recommend!!

author: Judy Stoddard
text: I shipped a large 80lb box to Chicago. Tyler carried it from our car. I did purchase insurance and a couple pieces were damaged. Shipping With Purpose stood behind everything and reimbursed me. I ship everything with them and they never fail to exceed expectations.

author: Stephan Pridonoff
text: Andy always looks out for me. Reminds me of the tv show Cheers where everyone knows your names. I enjoy now having to check my mail box. Also really like Chai, super friendly guy who will get my mail when I forget my key. Love this place!

author: Ildiko Mantella
text: I've been using this shipping service regularly for my small business, and I honestly can't say enough good things about them. I stop by a few times a week, and every time I walk in, I'm greeted warmly by their incredibly friendly and ... More

author: Robin Miller
text: I'm giving my highest review here. Why? Because aside from the fact that I'm always greeted with a smile, the shipping process is seamless every time. My return address is up-and-ready (on the computer) almost before I reach the counter, ... More

author: Jeff Rappaport
text: Shipping With Purpose is a very efficient way to ship packages along with other mailing services including USPS, Fed EX, UPS and DHL. The crew is Professional and friendly. ... More

author: Ernie Barrueta
text: Amazing Customer Service! CEO & staff always go above and beyond to assist me. Have been a long time customer, and plan to remain a customer for years to come! Highly recommended!

author: LoriAnn Harnish
text: Shipping with Purpose always greets me with a smile and happy hello. They care about serving my customer needs!
